title: Ubiquiti UACC-Uplink-SFP28-3M - DAC cable, 1-25 Gbps, 3m
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / DAC and AOC cables / AOC cables
description: Passive DAC cable for direct connection of two SFP, SFP+, or SFP28 ports with a link speed of 25 Gbps. This cable is 3 meters long and is also available in 30m or 0.15m variants. The cable is ideal for creating short connections between switches, routers, and other UniFi devices. Supported data rates: 25/10/1 Gbps Compatible with: SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Automatic optimization of link speed and connection stability when connecting UniFi devices Cable length: 3m Supported data rates: 25/10/1 Gbps Compatible with: SFP, SFP+, SFP28 Automatic optimization of link speed and connection stability when connecting UniFi devices Cable length: 3m
